serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL since 2026-05-07. Key: find_symbol --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path); receiver methods need '(*Type).method' qualified form; find_referencing_symbols requires --relative_path as file (not dir); search_for_pattern uses --substring_pattern. Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel. find_referencing_symbols on focused single-symbol queries ~2.3s (Run 9) - very usable for interface/exported-symbol usage audits. WARNING: broad find_symbol queries (e.g. function name without kind filter) can take 70+ seconds - prefer Grep for plain lookups.

completed_scans.dead_code_utility_packages: Run 8: 9 utility packages audited - all healthy. sliceutil 90 uses across 43 files, typeutil 115 across 15 files, stringutil 538 across 195 files, semverutil 11 across 8 files, jsonutil 5 across 3 files. envutil.GetIntFromEnv: 1 prod site (logs_orchestrator.go) - borderline acceptable.
completed_scans.workflow_dir_string_literal: Run 9: '.github/workflows' literal at 27 prod sites in 21 files; only 13 sites use constants.GetWorkflowDir(). PLUS constants.GetWorkflowDir() at constants.go:334-336 does NOT honor documented GH_AW_WORKFLOWS_DIR env-var override (README.md:349,488 claims it does). Doc/code contract drift. Issue: #aw_sg9a1.
completed_scans.top_level_interfaces_pkg: Run 9: 21 top-level interfaces in pkg/ non-test. Healthy clusters: agentic_engine.go (8 focused capability interfaces), log_aggregation.go (LogAnalysis + MutableLogAnalysis with 2 documented impls each). DUPLICATION: SHAResolver (pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:59) and ActionSHAResolver (pkg/workflow/action_resolver.go:16) have IDENTICAL single-method signatures - structurally identical. actionpins one used only as PinContext.Resolver field (1 site); workflow one used 17+ sites. pkg/workflow already imports pkg/actionpins. Issue: #aw_sg9a2. Single-implementer flagged but not filed: ValidatableTool (pkg/workflow/permissions_toolset_data.go:73, only impl *GitHubToolConfig, only consumer ValidatePermissions) - defensible.
completed_scans.github_workflows_filepath_join_join: Run 9: only 3 prod sites use filepath.Join(".github", "workflows", ...) form - constants.go:335, cli/fix_command.go:1, cli/copilot_setup.go:1. Most prefer single-string literal form.
completed_scans.lock_yml_extension_literal: Run 9: 41 occurrences of ".lock.yml" in 21 prod files. No central constants helper. Not filed (constant name would be longer than literal).

established_patterns.options_struct_model: CompileConfig in pkg/cli/compile_pipeline.go - reference model for refactors
established_patterns.string_constant_identity_switch: When const block defines `const Foo Scope = "foo"` and a switch maps "foo"->Foo, collapse to map-validated cast (see #aw_sg7a2)
established_patterns.pkg_constants_grouping: pkg/constants/constants.go is the canonical home for Default* constants. 7 files total in pkg/constants (constants.go, version_constants.go, url_constants.go, job_constants.go, engine_constants.go, feature_constants.go, tool_constants.go). Adding new named timeouts/permissions there fits the pattern. Run 9 CONFIRMED Run 8 issue #aw_sg8a1 was implemented: FilePerm{Sensitive,Public} and DirPerm{Sensitive,Public} fs.FileMode constants now at pkg/constants/constants.go:73-91.
established_patterns.helper_underadoption_failure_mode: Pattern emerging across Runs 5/7/8/9: helper or constant exists in pkg/constants but call sites bypass it via literal duplication. Audit Default*/Get* helpers each run for adoption percentage.

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks running multi-statement scripts (.sh files) and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls/wc/stat blocked outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw. Must Grep/Read directly and Write to memory directly (no mkdir). gh CLI in sandbox returns HTTP 403 on /meta endpoint - duplicate-issue detection by gh search not possible; rely on cache + safeoutputs. Heredoc append with `cat >> file << EOF` triggered 'brace with quote' policy in Run 8 - use Write tool to overwrite entire JSONL instead of bash append. mkdir blocked outside workspace - /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory/default/serena pre-existed already so no mkdir needed.
